Interpretation biologique
Analyse synthetique du bilan le plus recent : Glucose
[Mass/volume] in Blood eleve; Creatinine [Mass/volume] in
Blood eleve; Triglyceride [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
eleve; Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma eleve.
Les resultats ci-dessus doivent etre interpretes dans le
contexte clinique du patient. Antecedents ou contexte associe
: Metabolic syndrome X (disorder), Medication review due
(situation), Normal pregnancy (finding), Reports of violence in
the environment (finding). Document synthetique reserve aux
tests d'ingestion PDF, extraction de tableaux, OCR et RAG
multimodal.
Antecedents / contexte : Metabolic syndrome X (disorder),
Medication review due (situation), Normal pregnancy (finding),
Reports of violence in the environment (finding), Stress (finding)
